author: Wzyss
install_msg: Thank you for installing LFG. Use `[p]help lfg` for commands. Users can set availability per game, see who's available, request games, and opt in to DM notifications when someone notifies for a game.
name: LFG
short: Looking for Group: register availability per game, see who's available, notify via DM, request games.
description: Guild-scoped LFG: masterlist of games, per-user available/unavailable per game, view who is available, notify (DM) opted-in users, and request new games for admin approval.
